prompt: Write a 400-word community strategy for openpatent.ai. Cover: (1) the 4 community segments — (a) Builders (MCP-tool developers using the openpatent-mcp server, target 4,200 GitHub stars in 12 months), (b) Validators (the 33 BFT council members + the public testnet, target 12,000 testnet accounts), (c) Disclosers (the 95k+ paying customers across all tiers), (d) Advocates (the 250 affiliates + the 80 partners + 50k newsletter subs), (2) the 5 community channels — Discord (5,000 members target, 8 channels — #disclosures, #bft-council, #mcp-tools, #legal-questions, #multi-region, #off-topic, #support, #meta), GitHub Discussions (the canonical spec conversations), Twitter/X (the public hive), a monthly community call (open Zoom, last Friday of each month, 90min), the annual Hive Summit in London, (3) the 6 community-led programs — (a) MCP Tool of the Month (winner gets 1 yr Sovereign tier + featured in the launch blog), (b) BFT council public-review log (every 22/33 review is a public artifact with the BFT member pseudonym), (c) Disclosure Office Hours (2x/week, free 30min with a senior IP attorney), (d) 'First Disclosure' mentorship (1:1 pairing for solo inventors), (e) Sovereign Bug Bounty ($50k critical, $5k high, $1k medium), (f) open-spec RFC process (every 6-layer format change goes through a public RFC), (4) the 4 metrics — DAU/WAU/MAU, message volume, NPS-by-channel, community-sourced ARR, (5) the 2 dedicated roles — Community Lead (Discord + GitHub), DevRel Lead (MCP + BFT). Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {segments:[4 strings], channels:[5 strings], programs:[6 strings], metrics:[4 strings], roles:[2 strings]}.
